title: Settings
skills_description: Manage the skills applied to agents.

profile.heading: Profile
profile.description: Configure your agent context and developer information.

hint.github_username: Used to auto-load your profile picture.
hint.bio: Helps the agent understand your background.
hint.github_token: Used for repo cloning and API access. Stored locally only.

placeholder.bio: Backend API dev, Rust/TypeScript, startup CTO...

worldview.heading: User Worldview
worldview.description: A user-stance document referenced by the agent on every request, placed right before the identity section of the ContextPack. Max {{max}} tokens.
worldview.over_limit_note: — only the first portion will be injected

toast.saved: Worldview saved — will apply from the next request

worldview.placeholder: (Empty — load default or write your own)
worldview.default_template:
# User Worldview

## Ontology
(Default worldview — write your own)

## Engagement preference
(Preferred collaboration style with the agent — write your own)

identity.heading: Identity Analysis
identity.description: Periodically analyzes completed-plan artifacts to generate a project identity summary. The summary is auto-injected into ContextPack to improve consistency of future agent responses.
identity.toggle_label: Enable background analysis (when OFF, the worker will not pick pending jobs)
identity.threshold_hint: Runs automatically when Plan done count is a multiple of 3 AND eligible artifacts since the last summary reach this value. Default 10 (range 3-50).

status.heading: Current status
status.will_run: ✓ Will run on next plan completion

identity.force_hint: Plan done %3 condition is still enforced (partial-period analysis degrades quality)

toast.enqueued: Analysis job enqueued — worker will run within 30s

help.heading: Help
help.description: Overview of tunaFlow features, keyboard shortcuts, and troubleshooting.

crash_reports.title: Recent crash reports ({{count}})
crash_reports.location: File location: ~/.tunaflow/crash-reports/ · please attach when reporting issues.

pdr.title: Plan → Develop → Review
pdr.desc: The Architect designs a Plan, the Developer implements it, and the Reviewer verifies the result. On failure, a rev.N+1 Plan is proposed automatically based on findings.

branch.title: Branch / Roundtable
branch.desc: Branch off from the middle of a conversation for an independent experiment and adopt only the summary back. RT is a Branch extension where multiple engines discuss sequentially or in parallel.

contextpack.title: ContextPack
contextpack.desc: Assembles project docs, memory, and tool results into a shared format on every request. Auto-switches between Lite/Standard/Full to save tokens.

insight.title: Insight
insight.desc: Analyzes the project across six categories: stability, tests, architecture, performance, security, and tech debt. Quick Wins can be auto-fixed by the agent.

pty.title: PTY Terminal
pty.desc: Keeps an interactive session with CLI agents without the `-p` flag. Full tool usage including file edits and command execution is available.

no_response.title: The agent is not responding
no_response.desc: First check in Settings > Agents that the CLI is detected. Claude/Codex/Gemini each require a one-time login. If there is still no response after login, click the top RuntimeStatusBar to check process state.

insight_reset.title: Insight analysis resets right after starting
insight_reset.desc: State is preserved in Zustand even if you switch tabs while Insight runs. If resets continue, check the rawq daemon status in Settings > Runtime.

cpu_high.title: CPU usage is high
cpu_high.desc: The bge-m3 embedding indexer may be running. Switch to `incremental indexing only` mode in Settings > Runtime to avoid large re-indexing.

macos_gatekeeper.title: The app won't open on macOS
macos_gatekeeper.desc:
This is an ad-hoc signed build, so Gatekeeper may block it.
Run `xattr -cr /Applications/tunaFlow.app` in Terminal and try again.

mobile.heading: Mobile connection
mobile.description: Scan the QR code from the tunaFlow mobile app to connect automatically. PC and mobile must be on the same Wi-Fi network.

steps.step1: ① Open the tunaFlow mobile app in your mobile browser.
steps.step2_suffix: to scan the QR code above.
steps.step3: ③ Connection is automatic. (Manual entry is also supported.)

personas.heading: Personas
personas.description: Define agent roles and behavior rules. Select a persona in an Agent Profile to apply it.

agents.heading: Agent Profiles
agents.description: Manage agent profiles. Each profile bundles an engine, model, and default skills into a single execution unit.

role_coverage.title: Role coverage
role_coverage.hint: Assign profiles to the Architect (design), Developer (implement), Reviewer (≥2 reviewers), and Synthesizer (RT synthesis) roles to run Review RT / Plan approval / RT synthesis exactly as configured.

meta.heading: Meta-agent auto analysis (Tier 2)
meta.description: Automatically generates weekly summaries, failure pattern analysis, and artifact summaries using low-cost engines. Read-only — proposes only; execution requires user approval.
meta.auto_trigger_hint: — Runs analysis automatically when thresholds are reached

runtime.heading: Runtime
runtime.description: Inspect and manage the runtime environment.

workflow_skills.heading: Workflow Skills
workflow_skills.description: Skill sets per workflow phase. Combined with manual selection.

context_budget.persona_thread_note: Persona is always included when configured. Thread is automatically included for branches. rawq is included regardless of mode when code signals are detected.

insight_agent.description: Agent configuration used by the Insight tab analysis.

preset.balanced_claude_desc: Balance of accuracy and cost. Suitable for general code quality analysis.
preset.thorough_desc: In-depth analysis. More tokens, higher accuracy.
preset.security_desc: Security-focused analysis. Based on OWASP Top 10.
preset.balanced_gemini_desc: Uses the Gemini engine for a different perspective.

pty.hint: When PTY is disabled, all messages are sent via -p mode. Session can be reset with /clear.

attachments.heading: Attachments Cleanup
attachments.description: Clean up old attachment files inside `.tunaflow/attachments/`. (.gitignore is preserved.)

conventions.heading: Conventions Context Sync
conventions.description: Syncs static ContextPack layers (platform / agent role / persona / user profile) to CLAUDE.md / AGENTS.md / GEMINI.md. After editing, refresh files with "Sync Now".

toggle.label: Skip static layers in ContextPack
toggle.description: When enabled, static layers are not resent every turn. CLI auto-prepends CLAUDE.md/AGENTS.md, and the Anthropic API path benefits from prompt cache hits for cost savings. First add conventions for the project below and build the files via "Sync Now" to see actual effect.

conventions.sync_report: ✓ Sync complete — entry files: {{entry}}, split files: {{split}}
conventions.empty_hint: No conventions registered yet. Add one below.

layer.platform_hint: Project path, build commands, languages, etc.
layer.findings_hint: Findings body from a previous review verdict
